name: Advanced Excel
outcomes: Verifiable Excel credential covering advanced formulas, pivot analysis, financial modeling, and dashboard design — the baseline skill Finance and Consulting recruiters assume.

curriculum.desc: Advanced lookups, conditional logic, data cleaning at scale.
